content.text:
```mdl
@ Confidentiality (Non‑Disclosure) Agreement – Model
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_12_nda_1

open std.collections

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------------
   Domain types
   ---------------------------------------------------------------------- */
@ Parties to the Agreement
type Party =
    | BROOKS(unit)
    | CLIENT(unit)

@ Types of exceptions that defeat the confidentiality obligation
type ExceptionType =
    | AlreadyPossesses(unit)
    | IndependentlyDeveloped(unit)
    | RightfulThirdParty(unit)
    | Inadvertently(unit)
    | ClientConsent(unit)
    | ServicePerformance(unit)
    | PubliclyAvailable(unit)

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------------
   Entity that represents a piece of Confidential Information
   ---------------------------------------------------------------------- */
@ Clause 1 – definition of “Confidential Information”
type ConfidentialInfo = {
    disclosed_by : Party,          -- the party that supplied the information
    identified    : bool,          -- the information is expressly identified by the disclosing party
    exception_type: ExceptionType option,   -- None means no exception applies
    disclosed     : bool           -- true when BROOKS has actually disclosed the information
}
entity confidential_info : ConfidentialInfo

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------------
   Supporting entities for other obligations
   ---------------------------------------------------------------------- */
@ Event that a legal compulsion to disclose arises (Clause 4)
type CompelledEvent = {
    compelled          : bool,   -- true when a subpoena, court order, etc. is received
    notified_client    : bool,   -- true when BROOKS has sent the required written notice
    protective_order    : bool,   -- true when a protective order has been obtained
    waiver_obtained     : bool    -- true when CLIENT waives the confidentiality provision
}
entity compelled_event : CompelledEvent

@ Termination of the business relationship (Clause 5)
entity termination_event : { occurred : bool }

@ CLIENT’s written request for return of material (Clause 5)
entity client_return_request : { requested : bool }

@ Status of the material after termination (Clause 5)
type MaterialStatus = {
    returned        : bool,   -- true when material has been returned to CLIENT
    retained_years  : int,    -- number of years material has been retained
    disposed        : bool    -- true when material has been disposed
}
entity material_status : MaterialStatus

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------------
   Helper functions
   ---------------------------------------------------------------------- */
func has_exception(info : ConfidentialInfo) : bool =
    match info.exception_type with
        | Some(_) => true
        | None    => false

func exception_is_public(info : ConfidentialInfo) : bool =
    match info.exception_type with
        | Some(ExceptionType.PubliclyAvailable(_)) => true
        | _                                      => false

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------------
   Rules – deontic constraints
   ---------------------------------------------------------------------- */

/* Hypothesis: All Confidential Information shall be expressly identified
   by the Disclosing Party. */
@ Clause 1 – identification requirement
rule O identified_confidential_info:
    confidential_info.identified always

/* Obligation: BROOKS shall keep Confidential Information confidential
   unless an exception applies. */
@ Clause 1.2 – prohibition on disclosure
rule F brooks_prohibit_disclosure:
    confidential_info.disclosed_by = Party.CLIENT
    and not (has_exception(confidential_info))
    and confidential_info.disclosed always

/* Permission: Disclosure is allowed when a valid exception applies. */
@ Clause 3 – permitted disclosures
rule P brooks_allowed_disclosure:
    confidential_info.disclosed_by = Party.CLIENT
    and has_exception(confidential_info)
    implies confidential_info.disclosed always

/* Obligation: If BROOKS is legally compelled to disclose, it must notify CLIENT. */
@ Clause 4 – compelled disclosure notice
rule O brooks_notify_if_compelled:
    compelled_event.compelled implies compelled_event.notified_client always

/* Obligation: BROOKS must use best efforts (at CLIENT’s expense) to obtain a protective
   order or a waiver before any disclosure. */
@ Clause 4 – best‑efforts for protective order
rule O brooks_best_efforts_protective_order:
    compelled_event.compelled and not compelled_event.protective_order
    and not compelled_event.waiver_obtained
    implies (compelled_event.protective_order or compelled_event.waiver_obtained) always

/* Obligation: Upon termination, if CLIENT requests, BROOKS must return the material. */
@ Clause 5 – return on request
rule O brooks_return_on_request:
    termination_event.occurred and client_return_request.requested
    implies material_status.returned always

/* Obligation: If CLIENT does not request return, BROOKS may retain material for three
   years and then dispose of it. */
@ Clause 5 – retain‑then‑dispose when no request
rule O brooks_retain_then_dispose:
    termination_event.occurred and not client_return_request.requested
    implies (material_status.retained_years >= 3 implies material_status.disposed) always

/* Prohibition: Public disclosure without an applicable exception is forbidden. */
@ Clause 3.5 – public availability exception only
rule F brooks_prohibit_public_disclosure:
    confidential_info.disclosed_by = Party.CLIENT
    and not (exception_is_public(confidential_info))
    and confidential_info.disclosed always

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------------
   End of model
   ---------------------------------------------------------------------- */
```
